body:
## Problem
Mandatory registration before trying the product (Registration Blocker).

## Impact
- High drop-off rate for casual users
- Low user control/freedom (Heuristic #3)

## Tasks
- [ ] Modify `/editor` route to allow unauthenticated access
- [ ] Save guest resume data to `localStorage` exclusively
- [ ] Add a "Save for Later" CTA that prompts for account creation
- [ ] Ensure "Download PDF" prompts for account creation or guest-email capture
- [ ] Add session migration (merge Guest data into User account after sign-up)
title: [UX-01] Implement "Guest Mode" for the Resume Editor
